title: Meridian Realms
description: Official launcher for the Meridian Realms server network. Provides optimizations and graphical improvements that can be used anywhere.
body:
Official launcher for the Meridian Realms server network. This pack contains non-intrusive performance optimizations, graphical improvements, and quality of life tweaks that can be used anywhere. 

Learn more at our website: [Meridian Realms](https://meridianrealms.com/)
Join the server at : play.meridianrealms.com

**Stability**
All mods have been tested and validated for stability first. This is the core principl of this pack. Any and all crashes have been logged and addressed. I've personally experienced no issued since version 2.0.

**Performance**
Similarly to stability, performance is another core focus. All mods have been verified to help in an impactful and noticeable way while not affecting the core gameplay in any way.

**Graphics**
Graphics mods are intentionally limited in scope. Complementary Shaders are currently the only supported shaders, but more should be validated soon!

**Quality of Life**
As of now, Litematica, and Notes are included. More may be added as needed or requested.

**Feedback**
An issue tracker will be available soon where anybody can suggest features, report bugs, and assist with testing and validation.
